name: Camber Left
description: Shift all tokens in Rows 1-3 one lane Left.

name: Camber Right
description: Shift all tokens in Rows 1-3 one lane Right.

name: Brake Bumps
description: Shift Row 1 and Row 2 one lane toward the nearest Edge.

name: Compression
description: Shift Row 3 and Row 4 one lane toward the Center.

name: Loose Dirt
description: Shift Row 5 and Row 6 one lane in a random direction.
